titleStmt.title: SII 36.4: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 4. (A.R. No. 4 of 1910.) MUḌIGOṆḌAM (Muḍigoṇḍa), KOLLEGAL TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT. On the south wall of the Lakshmī Nārāyaṇaśvāmi temple.

summary.p: (Hēmaḷāmbi (Hēviḷambi), Viruśchika, śu., 5, Monday, Tiruvōṇam = A.D. 1237, November 23, Monday).

Unfinished and some portions at the end are lost. Seems to record a gift of lands and associated irrigation facilities with the remission of taxes to Dēsip-perumāḷ as tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam by one Aḍaippu Mudali and a merchant. Those against the grant are cursed as rājadrōhi and enemies of Vaḷañjiyar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pocaḷa somicuratevaṉ pradivirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷā nikka muṭikoṇṭacoḻapuramāna deśiuyakkoṇṭa paṭṭaṇattu hemaḷampi samvaṟsarattu vraccika nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu pañcamiyun tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa tiruvoṇattu nāḷ Aṭaippumutali velūruṭaiyān maṇṭalacuvāmi Āḻvāṇṭai Uṭaiyāṉ ta
rum kumarapperuvaṇikan tirukāṭuṭaiyān kūttāṇṭaiyān tiruvaraṅka dāsarkku cekkāṟkkuṭṭaiyu nīrkkoppu nīrvāriyum pūmāṇṭai cārikaiyum Ērikīḻt tiruvāḻikkal nāṭṭina perunāṉkellai Ittecip perumāḷukku tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāka cantradittavarai Iṟaiyiliye cellakkaṭavutākap ponnaṟak koṇṭu maṇṇaṟak kuṭuttom kūttāṇṭaikku Ivviruvomit taruma(t)ttukku Aḻi
vu niṉaittavan gaṅkaik karaiyil kurāṟpacuvaik koṉṟa pāvaṅ koḷvāṉ Innilamāhi piṭippār rājatrohi nāṭṭup pakaiyaṉ vaḷañciyap pakaiyaṉ māṟkadrogi-svastiśrī kumarapperuvaṇikan kāmādamiyāraṉ periyakoyil dāsar Āsan=titūmpiṉ kīḻ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭa nānūṟumā[hi] viṭṭen Āhipiṭittavan vaḷañciyap pakaivaṉne
Digital edition of SII 36.4 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
